name: huawei-waf
description: OctoBus package for Huawei Cloud WAF (Web Application Firewall) IP blacklist/whitelist management APIs.

Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/BlockIP.name: block-ip
Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/BlockIP.description: Block an IP via WAF blacklist rule.

Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/UnblockIP.description: Remove a blacklist rule to unblock an IP.

Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/ListRules.name: list-rules
Huawei_WAF.Huawei_WAF/ListRules.description: List all blacklist/whitelist rules for the WAF policy.
